title: Correctly combining control modifiers in OptimizeAnnotated
notes: wrong combination of control modifiers -> wrong unitary

title: Fix CommutationChecker for controlled rotation gates
notes: wrong commutation -> unsafe cancellation -> wrong unitary

title: Reject loopback edges in CouplingMap
notes: input-validation hardening against invalid coupling map

title: Fix TemplateOptimization dropping the global_phase on substitution
notes: global phase dropped; invisible to equivalence-modulo-global-phase oracles

title: Fix BasisTranslator processing of nested ControlFlowOp
notes: mishandled nested control-flow during translation (crash/invalid)

title: Fix BreakLoopOp object has no attribute blocks bug
notes: AttributeError crash during transpilation

title: Fix reuse of ConsolidateBlocks instances
notes: stateful pass reuse yields wrong output on second run (usage-dependent)

title: Fix VF2PostLayout with uncoupled qubits in strict_direction=True
notes: edge-case failure in layout pass with uncoupled qubits

title: Fix TranspileLayout.initial_index_layout with unordered virtuals
notes: corrupted initial_index_layout property; applied output may be correct

title: Fix VF2 layout allocation with idle qubits
notes: idle-qubit allocation affects layout quality (ambiguous; could be metadata)

title: Fix composition of final_layout
notes: wrong composed final_layout metadata (study event H2)

title: Fix non-determinism in CommutativeCancellation
notes: nondeterministic output across fixed-seed runs

title: Fix non-determinism VF2Layout with only 1q gates
notes: nondeterministic layout (study event H3)

title: Restore correct max_trials behaviour for VF2Layout pass
notes: trials regression -> worse layout quality

title: Fix deepcopy/pickle of DAGCircuit variable IO nodes
notes: serialization crash (API-level; borderline transpile scope)

title: Fix composing virtual permutation layouts for ElidePermutations and StarPreRouting
notes: wrong composed virtual_permutation_layout metadata

title: Propagate DAGCircuit.name in ApplyLayout
notes: name metadata not propagated; output unitary unaffected

title: Add 2q fractional gates to the ConsolidateBlocks transpiler pass
notes: handling of fractional 2q gates in consolidation (could be enhancement)

title: Use average gate fidelity in the commutation checker
notes: changes commutation metric; affects optimization quality

title: Fix tracking of routing permutation in Sabre with disjoint backends
notes: wrong routing_permutation tracking; TranspileLayout assertion fails

title: Delegate BasePass.__call__ to PassManager.run
notes: API/contract plumbing fix (borderline transpile scope)

title: Do not contract control-flow operations during SabreSwap
notes: incorrect routing of control-flow ops

title: Fix 4-pi periodicity of controlled rotations in the CommutationChecker
notes: wrong commutation for 4-pi periodicity -> unsafe cancellation

title: Fix ElidePermutations pass in the presence of PermutationGates
notes: corrupts virtual_permutation_layout (study event H1; built-from-source confirmed)

title: VF2PostLayout added at L3 (no-op overhead; reverted)
notes: compile-time overhead (study event H4; below screen on commodity HW)

title: Fix panic on 1.0 error in VF2Layout
notes: VF2Layout panic/crash (study event H5)

title: Fix cache and prediction misses in Target::qargs
notes: Target qargs cache/prediction misses caused a compile-time regression; output and circuit quality unchanged.

title: Accept rotation gate names in CommutationChecker filters
notes: CommutationChecker falsely reported matching rotation gates as non-commuting under name filters, blocking valid optimization.

title: Fix incorrect global phase shift for P and U1 gates in CommutativeCancellation
notes: CommutativeCancellation applied an incorrect phase shift for P/U1 gates; the defect is global phase only.

title: Fix schedule analysis passes with empty circuits
notes: Schedule-analysis passes raised an error on empty circuits instead of compiling them.

title: Avoid panics in Optimize1qGatesDecomposition
notes: Optimize1qGatesDecomposition panicked on legitimate Python-side inputs that should yield a handled error.

title: Fix pickling of SabreSwap
notes: Pickling a SabreSwap pass failed because its routing target was not serializable; API/serialization edge case.

title: Un-provide standard_operation for PyGate
notes: PyGate conversion lost the non-default control state of controlled gates, producing a different operation.

title: Check target gates are parameterized in optimize1qgatesdecomposition
notes: The optimization treated fixed-parameter Target gates as arbitrary parameterized gates, violating the Target compatibility contract while preserving the logical map.

title: Raise exception not panic on bad ConsolidateBlocks input
notes: Bad ConsolidateBlocks input caused a Rust panic rather than a normal transpiler exception.

title: Read timing constraints from target when no backend is provided
notes: When no backend was supplied, the preset flow ignored timing constraints supplied through Target; the quantum output map is unchanged.

title: Fix global cache of SynthesizeRZRotations
notes: A global SynthesizeRZRotations cache was reused across incompatible settings and could trigger a panic.

title: Fix non-deterministic ConsolidateBlocks output with fixed transpiler seed
notes: ConsolidateBlocks could produce different outputs across fixed-seed runs because of unordered iteration.

title: Preserve global phase in Commuting2qGateRouter
notes: Commuting2qGateRouter failed to carry forward the input circuit global phase.

title: Fix excessive global-phase accumulation in UnrollForLoops
notes: UnrollForLoops accumulated global phase incorrectly when unrolling a loop body.

title: Fix unsafe symmetric simplification of XXPlusYY in CommutativeOptimization
notes: An unsafe symmetry assumption allowed incorrect cancellation of XXPlusYY gates with reversed qubit order.

title: Fix cancellation of CS and CSdg in InverseCancellation
notes: Inverse CS/CSdg pairs were not cancelled in some qubit-order cases, leaving an otherwise removable gate pair.

title: Fix forced ConsolidateBlocks decomposition for incomplete bases
notes: ConsolidateBlocks failed to perform a requested consolidation with an incomplete basis, producing a less optimized circuit.

title: Fix ParameterVector global-phase panic in RemoveIdentityEquivalent
notes: RemoveIdentityEquivalent panicked on a ParameterVector global-phase expression.

title: Fix commutation checking between two Pauli product measurements
notes: The commutation check incorrectly reordered Pauli-product measurements that wrote to the same classical bit.

title: Fix synth_qft_line failure for circuits with 32 or more qubits
notes: For 32+ qubits, QFT synthesis could panic in debug builds and silently overflow to an incorrect circuit in release builds.

title: Fix stale best-DAG update in C transpiler optimization level 3
notes: Level-3 optimization retained a stale best DAG after finding a better score, returning a worse circuit.

title: Fix matrix-size validation in CommutationChecker
notes: Faulty matrix-size validation admitted oversized commutation checks, adding unnecessary compile-time cost.

title: Fix synth_clifford_depth_lnn for single-qubit Clifford circuits
notes: Single-qubit input to the LNN Clifford synthesis path caused a capacity-overflow panic.

title: Fix HLS qubit tracking for plugin-generated operations
notes: HLS tracked plugin-generated auxiliary qubits incorrectly, allowing an invalid qubit allocation that can alter the compiled computation.

title: Fix zero-length permutation synthesis overflow
notes: Zero-length permutation synthesis could underflow/overflow rather than return a valid result.

title: Fix incorrect argument passed to generate_unroll_3q in Clifford+T transpilation
notes: Clifford+T transpilation passed the wrong optimization metric, yielding materially more T gates.

title: Respect Target when selecting a non-default UnitarySynthesis plugin
notes: A non-default UnitarySynthesis plugin did not respect the supplied Target when a standalone basis was present; Target compatibility was violated without changing the logical map.

title: Fix control-flow qargs handling in BasisTranslator
notes: BasisTranslator used local instead of absolute qargs inside control-flow, translating operations on the wrong qubits.

title: Fix ConsolidateBlocks qubit mapping inside control-flow blocks
notes: Incorrect control-flow qubit mapping made in-basis blocks appear out of basis and consolidated them unnecessarily; the logical map remains intact but the basis contract is violated.

title: Fix DAG push-edge ordering non-determinism
notes: DAG push-edge ordering depended on non-deterministic traversal, making compiler output vary across otherwise identical runs.

title: Preserve registers through Python Layout to Rust TranspileLayout conversion
notes: Register information was lost during Python Layout to Rust TranspileLayout conversion.

title: Fix global-phase handling in CommutativeCancellation
notes: CommutativeCancellation omitted required global-phase updates for some cancellations.

title: Do not run VF2PostLayout when an explicit layout is supplied
notes: VF2PostLayout could override an explicitly supplied layout or layout method; the layout-applied circuit map remains correct.

title: Fix Target.py_instruction_supported behavior
notes: Target.py_instruction_supported incorrectly skipped qarg-order validation and returned a wrong support/compatibility result.

title: Fix MCX dirty-ancilla qubit accounting in HLS selection
notes: Dirty-ancilla availability was undercounted, so an applicable synthesis plugin was not selected.

title: Fix CommutativeInverseCancellation for Clifford, control-flow, and non-invertible operations
notes: CommutativeInverseCancellation raised errors on control-flow, Clifford, and non-invertible operations.

title: Fix ApplyLayout with empty layout
notes: ApplyLayout falsely rejected a valid zero-qubit/empty-layout case.

title: Fix HLS classical-bit mapping from control-flow blocks
notes: HLS mapped classical bits inside control-flow to local instead of global circuit indices, changing measurement/control behavior.

title: Fix alignment checks of stretch variables
notes: Alignment checking attempted arithmetic on expression-based stretch durations and raised a transpiler error.

title: Fix subtraction-underflow panic in ConstrainedReschedule
notes: ConstrainedReschedule performed unsigned subtraction that could underflow and panic.

title: Initialize ConstrainedReschedule.target unconditionally
notes: ConstrainedReschedule constructed without Target raised AttributeError instead of running the advertised alignment-only path.

title: Fix ConstrainedReschedule barrier handling
notes: ConstrainedReschedule rejected barrier directives during rescheduling despite supporting them by contract.

title: Add safe shape checking to synth_cz_depth_line_mr
notes: synth_cz_depth_line_mr could panic on an unchecked non-square matrix shape.

title: Fix HighLevelSynthesis for custom gate calibrations
notes: HLS failed to preserve/recognize a nested custom gate calibration; the calibration contract is output-invisible to a unitary-only oracle.
